testing_centers.provider: ICMAI Regional and Chapter Exam Centres

id_requirements: ICMAI Registration Number + valid government-issued photo ID (Aadhaar, Passport, Voter ID, Driving Licence)
exam_rules: Pen-and-paper examination at designated centres. No electronic devices permitted. Papers are descriptive/analytical; no multiple-choice format. Negative marking does not apply.
renewal_options: CMA membership is for lifetime; Certificate of Practice holders must complete 30 CPD hours every 3 years

prerequisites.description: CMA Intermediate (both groups) cleared; completion of 15-month practical training under a CMA in practice

retake_policy.notes: Exams held in June and December; no limit on total attempts; exemption in passed papers valid for next 3 attempts

domains.name: Paper 13: Corporate Laws and Compliance (Companies Act, SEBI, FEMA, Insolvency Code)
Paper 14: Strategic Financial Management (Portfolio, Derivatives, M&A, Risk Management)
Paper 15: Strategic Cost Management (ABM, Value Chain, Target Costing, Lean, TOC)
Paper 16: Direct Tax Laws and International Taxation (Income Tax + Transfer Pricing + DTAA)

official_study_resources.title: ICMAI Suggested Answers and Past Papers
